parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When 'On' data is captured from the Leap Motion sensor.

parameters.name: api
parameters.label: API
parameters.description: Select between Leap Motion V2 or V4/V5 SDKs for tracking. V5 offers the fastest and most stable tracking, V2 offers some legacy features like gestures.

parameters.name: libfolder
parameters.label: Library Folder
parameters.description: This parameter is used on Windows only to point to the location of the library file (.dll) that corresponds to the selected API version. The dll file can be found in the driver kit downloaded from the

parameters.name: hmd
parameters.label: HMD Mode
parameters.description: Switches the device to ead ounted isplay mode.

parameters.name: debugchannels
parameters.label: Debug Channels
parameters.description: If set, the following channels will be included:

parameters.name: statuschannels
parameters.label: Status Channels
parameters.description: If set, the following channels will be included:

parameters.name: namedhands
parameters.label: Named Hands
parameters.description: This names the hand channels as either right (r) or left (l) hands.

parameters.name: hands
parameters.label: Hands
parameters.description: Number of hands. The following channels will be included for each detected hand:

parameters.name: lefthands
parameters.label: Left Hands
parameters.description: When using 'Named Hands', specify how many left hands will be tracked.

parameters.name: righthands
parameters.label: Right Hands
parameters.description: When using 'Named Hands', specify how many right hands will be tracked.

parameters.name: handvelocity
parameters.label: Hand Velocity
parameters.description: If set, the following channels will be included for each hand, in addition to any others:

parameters.name: handsphere
parameters.label: Hand Sphere
parameters.description: This is only available when using API = Version 2 Tracking. It adds the following channels to tracking hands:

parameters.name: pinchstrength
parameters.label: Pinch Strength
parameters.description: Pinch is defined as the distance between the thumb and first finger.

parameters.name: grabstrength
parameters.label: Grab Strength
parameters.description: Grab is defined as how close a hand is to being a fist.

parameters.name: namedfingers
parameters.label: Named Fingers
parameters.description: Instead of simply using a finger index number for each finger tracked, when On this names the finger channels as thumb, index, middle, ring, and pinky.

parameters.name: fingersperhand
parameters.label: Fingers per Hand
parameters.description: When not using 'Named Fingers', specify how many fingers to track per hand.

parameters.name: fingerrotation
parameters.label: Finger Rotation
parameters.description: Track the rotation for all fingers.

parameters.name: fingersize
parameters.label: Finger Size
parameters.description: If set, the following channels will be included for each finger, in addition to any others:

parameters.name: fingerextended
parameters.label: Finger Extended
parameters.description: Track how straight the fingers are, a finger is considered extended when it is straight as if pointing.

parameters.name: fingerjoints
parameters.label: Finger Joints
parameters.description: Tracks the position of every joint of every finger.

parameters.name: tools
parameters.label: Tools
parameters.description: Number of tools. The following channels will be included for each detected tool:

parameters.name: circlegestures
parameters.label: Circle Gestures
parameters.description: Number of circle gestures. The following channels will be included for each detected :

parameters.name: swipegestures
parameters.label: Swipe Gestures
parameters.description: Number of swipe gestures. The following channels will be included for each detected :

parameters.name: keytapgestures
parameters.label: Key Tap Gestures
parameters.description: Number of key tap gestures. The following channels will be included for each detected :

parameters.name: screentapgestures
parameters.label: Screen Tap Gestures
parameters.description: Number of screen tap gestures, which is recognized as a quick forward tapping movement by a tool or finger. The following channels will be included for each detected screen tap gesture:

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: deviceinfo
parameters.label: Deviceinfo
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
